# stalwart_domain (Data Source)

Reads an existing domain registered in Stalwart Mail Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "stalwart_domain" "example" {
  name = "example.com"
}

output "domain_description" {
  value = data.stalwart_domain.example.description
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Domain name to look up, e.g. example.com.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Human-readable label for the domain.
